sources.name: Federal Register - VA Rules & Regulations
sources.notes: Official federal rulemaking. JSON API returns VA-related proposed and final rules. Highest authority source.

sources.name: VA.gov News Releases
sources.notes: Official VA press releases and news. RSS feed. Covers policy changes, benefits updates, facility news.

sources.name: CAVC Decisions
sources.notes: Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims opinions. Must scrape HTML. Precedential decisions shape VA claims law.

sources.name: BVA Decisions
sources.notes: Board of Veterans Appeals decisions search. High volume, useful for trend analysis. Web scrape required.

sources.name: Congress.gov - Veterans Legislation
sources.notes: Congressional legislation related to veterans affairs. Tracks new bills, amendments, and votes. Web scrape.

sources.name: Military.com Veterans News
sources.notes: Popular military/veteran news outlet. RSS feed. Covers benefits, claims tips, policy changes. Some editorial slant.

sources.name: Stars and Stripes - Veterans
sources.notes: Independent military newspaper. RSS feed. Editorially independent, credible reporting on veteran issues.

sources.name: VFW News & Media
sources.notes: Veterans of Foreign Wars press releases. VSO perspective on policy. Web scrape required.

sources.name: DAV News
sources.notes: Disabled American Veterans news. Strong advocacy focus on disability claims and benefits. Web scrape.

sources.name: American Legion News
sources.notes: American Legion news feed. Covers legislation, benefits, veteran services. RSS feed.

sources.name: Reddit r/VeteransBenefits
sources.notes: Community discussions on VA benefits. JSON API. High volume, low reliability but excellent for trend detection and real veteran experiences. User-agent header required.

sources.name: VA Office of Inspector General Reports
sources.notes: Inspector General reports on VA waste, fraud, abuse, and systemic issues. High impact, lower frequency. Web scrape.

sources.name: BVA Decision Search API (V2V)
sources.notes: V2V's own BVA API. Searches BVA decisions, extracts case metadata, runs regex presets (nexus opinions, CFR citations, diagnostic codes, TDIU, CUE). Also has CAVC eFiling search for court records, docket reports, and documents.
